app_info.subtitle: Interactive quizzes
app_info.description: BetterQuizzes lets ChatGPT build mixed-format practice quizzes, open them in an interactive widget, collect answers with confidence and timing, and return a structured submission for grading and feedback.

justifications.read_only_justification: Creates only an in-memory quiz draft for the current BetterQuizzes app session; it does not publish, persist, or modify external user data.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not publish content or modify any external service.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Adds the first question only to an in-memory BetterQuizzes draft and opens exactly one widget for the current app session.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not publish content or modify any external service.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Adds one later question only to an in-memory BetterQuizzes draft for the current app session; it does not open another widget, publish, persist, or modify external user data.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not publish content or modify any external service.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Repairs or replaces one question only in an in-memory BetterQuizzes draft for the current app session; it does not publish, persist, or modify external user data.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not publish content or modify any external service.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Opens the latest stored BetterQuizzes quiz widget without modifying external state.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not publish content or modify any external service.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Stores a complete quiz packet in server memory and opens the BetterQuizzes widget.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not publish content or modify any external service.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Processes submitted answers for the current BetterQuizzes session and returns a submission packet.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not publish content or modify any external service.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Alias for submit_answers that processes submitted answers for the current BetterQuizzes session.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not publish content or modify any external service.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Stores grade feedback for the current BetterQuizzes session in server memory.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not publish content or modify any external service.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Only retrieves recorded grade feedback for a quiz or session.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not publish content or modify any external service.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Only retrieves a summary and render diagnostics for a stored quiz.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not publish content or modify any external service.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

test_cases.description: Create a short assistant-authored mixed-format practice quiz.
test_cases.user_prompt: Make me a 4-question practice quiz about photosynthesis with a mix of question types.
test_cases.expected_output: The first accepted add_first_question call launches exactly one BetterQuizzes widget, and later add_question calls add questions to that same activity.

test_cases.description: Create an ordering question and launch it through the builder flow.
test_cases.user_prompt: Make a one-question quiz where I drag these app release steps into the right order.
test_cases.expected_output: Launches an ordering quiz whose items can be rearranged in the widget.

test_cases.description: Repair an invalid draft question without restarting the quiz.
test_cases.user_prompt: Create a quiz with an ordering question, and if the question needs repair, fix just that question.
test_cases.expected_output: Launches the first valid question once, then repairs only the invalid later question while the same widget polls for the corrected draft.

test_cases.description: Submit completed answers from the widget for grading.
test_cases.user_prompt: I finished the BetterQuizzes activity. Grade my submitted answers.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns a SubmissionCapsule that ChatGPT can grade without recreating the quiz.

test_cases.description: Record and retrieve grade feedback for the widget.
test_cases.user_prompt: Record this quiz grade so the widget can show my feedback, then check that it was saved.
test_cases.expected_output: Stores grade feedback for the quiz session and retrieves the saved grade state.

test_cases.description: Open a complete user-supplied legacy quiz packet.
test_cases.user_prompt: Open this complete BetterQuizzes QuizSpec v2 packet as a quiz.
test_cases.expected_output: Validates the complete quiz packet and launches it in the BetterQuizzes widget.

test_cases.description: Inspect a stored quiz for render diagnostics.
test_cases.user_prompt: Inspect the BetterQuizzes quiz I just created and tell me whether every question is renderable.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns a concise quiz summary with render diagnostics and question counts.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for ordinary homework explanations without an interactive quiz request.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Explain photosynthesis to me in simple terms.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because the user asked for a text explanation, not an interactive quiz.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for unrelated calendar or scheduling tasks.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Schedule a study session for tomorrow afternoon.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because BetterQuizzes does not manage calendars.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for requests to publish or send quiz results externally.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Email my quiz score to my teacher and post it online.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked for sending email or publishing results because it has no external messaging or posting capability.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger when the user wants to enter sensitive personal data.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Make a quiz that asks students for their full names, home addresses, and medical history before they can answer.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not collect unnecessary sensitive personal information. ChatGPT should suggest a privacy-preserving quiz instead.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not promise durable classroom gradebook storage.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Use BetterQuizzes as my permanent class gradebook and store all student scores for the semester.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked as a durable classroom gradebook because BetterQuizzes stores quiz and grade state only temporarily for the current app session.
